title: Budget Analyst

rationales.taskAutomation: Variance reporting, trend analysis, and cost-allocation math are largely templated digital output; only cross-department negotiation and strategic allocation calls resist automation.
rationales.toolMaturity: FP&A platforms with embedded forecasting AI (Planful, Vena, Datarails) are mature and widely deployed for standard variance and budget reporting.
rationales.adoption: Common practice at large firms and increasingly standard in mid-market finance teams and government budget offices.
rationales.agenticExposure: Recurring variance-report-and-forecast cycles are a scoped, verifiable workflow an agent can own between human budget reviews.

tasksGrowing: AI-driven financial planning and scenario modeling
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 13-2031 (Budget Analysts), p25-p75 rounded
insight: AI now closes the variance-report-to-forecast loop with minimal input, but budget analysts who can advise leadership on trade-offs and broker cross-department negotiation still set the agenda.
